requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (ANOR NC / IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（ANOR NC / IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（ANOR NC / IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Electrical safety for household refrigerating appliances entering Cameroon is assessed against the Cameroonian standard (Norme Camerounaise, NC) adopted by ANOR, which is generally an adoption of the international IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read together with the general standard IEC 60335-1. Key requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength, earthing continuity, and markings. Compliance is demonstrated through test reports forming part of the PECAE conformity-assessment dossier that supports the Certificate of Conformity. Cameroon's grid is 220 V, 50 Hz — the same 50 Hz frequency and a similar 220 V single-phase nominal voltage as China's domestic single-phase supply (note China's three-phase supply is 380 V), which reduces voltage/frequency-related design rework relative to markets on other grids.
summary.zh: 进入喀麦隆的家用制冷器具电气安全依据ANOR采用的喀麦隆标准（Norme Camerounaise，NC）评定，该标准通常为国际IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）的采用，并与通用标准IEC 60335-1结合使用。核心要求涵盖防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、机械强度、接地连续性及标识。合规通过构成PECAE合格评定档案一部分、支持符合性证书的检测报告证明。喀麦隆电网为220 V、50 Hz——与中国国内单相供电同为50 Hz频率且标称电压相近（均为220 V单相，注：中国三相供电为380 V），相较其他电网市场可减少与电压/频率相关的设计改造。
summary.zht: 進入喀麥隆的家用製冷器具電氣安全依據ANOR採用的喀麥隆標準（Norme Camerounaise，NC）評定，該標準通常為國際IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）的採用，並與通用標準IEC 60335-1結合使用。核心要求涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、機械強度、接地連續性及標識。合規通過構成PECAE合格評定檔案一部分、支持符合性證書的檢測報告證明。喀麥隆電網為220 V、50 Hz——與中國國內單相供電同為50 Hz頻率且標稱電壓相近（均為220 V單相，註：中國三相供電為380 V），相較其他電網市場可減少與電壓/頻率相關的設計改造。

standards_or_laws: NC / IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (as adopted by ANOR)
NC / IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
Grid: 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase (same 50 Hz as China; similar 220 V single-phase nominal voltage)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24 but incorporating Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before domestic sale. Because both GB 4706.13 and Cameroon's NC trace to IEC 60335-2-24, the technical safety requirements are closely aligned, though Chinese national deviations and the destination conformity-assessment process mean a CCC report is supporting evidence rather than an automatic pass.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24但包含中国国家偏差，并与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）在中国强制认证（CCC）制度下执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在国内销售。由于GB 4706.13与喀麦隆NC均溯源至IEC 60335-2-24，技术安全要求高度一致，但中国国家偏差及目的国合格评定流程意味着CCC报告为支持性证据而非自动通过。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24但包含中國國家偏差，並與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）在中國強制認證（CCC）制度下執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在國內銷售。由於GB 4706.13與喀麥隆NC均溯源至IEC 60335-2-24，技術安全要求高度一致，但中國國家偏差及目的國合格評定流程意味著CCC報告為支持性證據而非自動通過。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both regimes derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the technical safety gap is small, and the shared 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase voltage means little or no voltage/frequency redesign (unlike 60 Hz or 110 V markets). The remaining gaps are procedural and configuration-related: (1) a Chinese CCC report (GB 4706.13) is supporting evidence in the PECAE dossier but is not an automatic Cameroon pass — the PECAE body assesses conformity to the NC / IEC 60335-2-24 and issues the Certificate of Conformity; (2) Chinese national deviations in GB 4706.13 (e.g., plug/socket type, earthing arrangements, test conditions) should be reviewed against the IEC text so the test data clearly maps to IEC 60335-2-24; (3) the mains plug should match Cameroon practice (European-style Type C/E sockets are common); (4) markings and instructions must be in French (see frigcm-market-002). An IECEE CB-Scheme report on the IEC 60335-2-24 basis is typically the cleanest evidence for the PECAE assessment.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技术安全差距较小，且共享220 V/50 Hz单相电压意味着几乎无须电压/频率重新设计（不同于60 Hz或110 V市场）。其余差距属程序及配置相关：（1）中国CCC报告（GB 4706.13）在PECAE档案中为支持性证据，但非自动构成喀麦隆通过——由PECAE机构评定是否符合NC/IEC 60335-2-24并签发符合性证书；（2）GB 4706.13中的中国国家偏差（如插头/插座类型、接地方式、试验条件）应对照IEC正文审核，使检测数据清晰对应IEC 60335-2-24；（3）电源插头应符合喀麦隆惯例（欧式C/E型插座常见）；（4）标识及说明书须以法语呈现（见frigcm-market-002）。基于IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB体系报告通常是PECAE评定最清晰的证据。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技術安全差距較小，且共享220 V/50 Hz單相電壓意味著幾乎無須電壓/頻率重新設計（不同於60 Hz或110 V市場）。其餘差距屬程序及配置相關：（1）中國CCC報告（GB 4706.13）在PECAE檔案中為支持性證據，但非自動構成喀麥隆通過——由PECAE機構評定是否符合NC/IEC 60335-2-24並簽發符合性證書；（2）GB 4706.13中的中國國家偏差（如插頭/插座類型、接地方式、試驗條件）應對照IEC正文審核，使檢測數據清晰對應IEC 60335-2-24；（3）電源插頭應符合喀麥隆慣例（歐式C/E型插座常見）；（4）標識及說明書須以法語呈現（見frigcm-market-002）。基於IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB體系報告通常是PECAE評定最清晰的證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety conformity to NC / IEC 60335-2-24 required for the PECAE Certificate of Conformity before clearance at Douala / Kribi
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite, Cameroun)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety for refrigerators entering Cameroon is assessed to NC / IEC 60335-2-24 within the PECAE conformity dossier. Because Chinese GB 4706.13 derives from the same IEC standard and Cameroon shares China's 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase voltage, the technical gap is small. A CCC report is supporting evidence, not an automatic pass — the PECAE body issues the Certificate of Conformity. Review Chinese national deviations against the IEC text, match the plug type, and provide French markings/instructions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入喀麦隆的电冰箱电气安全在PECAE合格评定档案内依据NC/IEC 60335-2-24评定。由于中国GB 4706.13源自同一IEC标准，且喀麦隆与中国同为220 V/50 Hz单相电压，技术差距较小。CCC报告为支持性证据而非自动通过——由PECAE机构签发符合性证书。请对照IEC正文审核中国国家偏差、匹配插头类型并提供法语标识/说明书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入喀麥隆的電冰箱電氣安全在PECAE合格評定檔案內依據NC/IEC 60335-2-24評定。由於中國GB 4706.13源自同一IEC標準，且喀麥隆與中國同為220 V/50 Hz單相電壓，技術差距較小。CCC報告為支持性證據而非自動通過——由PECAE機構簽發符合性證書。請對照IEC正文審核中國國家偏差、匹配插頭類型並提供法語標識/說明書。
